Lalkilla

A product of Rhino Industries

It is a high-quality tea that does not require any blending and is made by the CTC (Cut, Tear, Curl) method of processing. It has a clear color, mellow aroma, bright flavor, and lasting aftertaste.


Product Specifications

  • Form: Granules/Powder
  • Form: Granules/Powder
  • Form: Granules/Powder
  • Form: Granules/Powder
